name: Athasian Elf

effects.name: Elf Sleep
effects.description: You need only 4 hours of normal sleep to get adequate rest.

effects.name: Elf Run
effects.description: Athasian Elves can typically run 50 to 70 miles a day. It takes an action to induce the Elf Run state. While in that state, you only need to check for exhaustion once per watch, so long as you maintain a fast pace or greater. You can maintain this state for up to seven days, and while in this state, you do not suffer the effects of exhaustion until you stop running.

description: Humanoid. Medium (about 6½–7½ feet tall). Speed: 35 feet. Athasian elves are tall desert runners adapted to the wastes. Elven Lineage grants supernatural abilities at character levels 1, 3, and 5, each usable once per day: Weather Sense (predict the weather at your location for the next 24 hours), Dune Runner (your speed increases by 10 for 1 hour), and Mask of the Wild (while in natural terrain, you and chosen creatures within 30 feet gain +10 to Dexterity (Stealth) checks and leave no tracks for 1 hour). Elven Resilience: you have advantage on all saves against extreme heat or cold. Keen Senses: gain proficiency in Insight, Perception, or Survival. Elf Sleep: you need only 4 hours of normal sleep to get adequate rest. Elf Run: Athasian Elves can typically run 50 to 70 miles a day. It takes an action to induce the Elf Run state. While in that state, you only need to check for exhaustion once per watch, so long as you maintain a fast pace or greater. You can maintain this state for up to seven days, and while in this state, you do not suffer the effects of exhaustion until you stop running.
